scripts.dev: yarn workspaces foreach -A --exclude start-admin --exclude start-site -pi run dev
scripts.build: yarn workspaces foreach -A --exclude start-admin --exclude start-site -pt run build
scripts.lint: yarn workspaces foreach -A --exclude start-admin --exclude start-site -pt run lint
scripts.test: yarn workspaces foreach -A --exclude start-admin --exclude start-site -pt run test
